The Program

A Rare 6-Day Sacred
Immersion in Shakti Wisdom

The Dasha Mahavidya Journey is an in-person immersive retreat for spiritual practitioners who feel a genuine call toward the sacred feminine, Tantric wisdom, and the path of the Goddess.

Over six days at Sattva Sanctuary, you will be guided through the teachings of the ten great wisdom goddesses — the Dasha Mahavidyas — through mantra, meditation, ritual, and direct experiential practice, held within the Sri Vidya tradition.

This is not a wellness retreat or a beginner workshop. It is a genuine lineage transmission — deep, experiential, and transformative — for those who are truly ready to receive it.

Is This Path For You?

Who This Journey Welcomes

Before going deeper — these teachings carry real depth and require genuine readiness. Read this honestly before applying.

This is for you
  • You feel a sincere call toward Shakti, the sacred feminine, or Tantric wisdom
  • You have an existing meditation, yoga, or inner work practice
  • You are drawn to authentic lineage teachings — not surface-level spirituality
  • You are ready for deep transformation, not just inspiration
  • You can hold space for discomfort, shadow, and dissolution
  • You approach the goddess path with reverence and genuine intent
  • You are seeking direct transmission, not theory alone
Not quite right if…
  • You are completely new to meditation or inner work
  • You are looking for a yoga holiday or wellness retreat
  • You approach these teachings as intellectual or cultural curiosity alone
  • You are not willing to engage with the fierce, dissolving aspects of the feminine
  • You cannot fully commit to the 6-day container

If you're on the edge and unsure, the application process is designed to help you discern together.

Your Guide

Meet Ritika

Ritika brings years of sincere study and practice within the Sri Vidya lineage to this transmission. Her teaching emerges not from theory, but from lived practice — from the long hours of sadhana, from sitting with teachers who have walked this path for decades, and from the continuous deepening of her own relationship with the Mahavidyas.

She holds this work with both structural rigor and deep devotion — ensuring that what is offered is authentic, safe, and aligned with the traditional guru–shishya (teacher–student) transmission that these teachings require.

Her offerings draw from the intersection of Shakta Tantra, Sri Vidya, mantra science, and embodied feminine wisdom — brought forward with clarity, depth, and genuine care for each student's inner journey.

Sri Vidya Lineage Shakta Tantra Mantra Transmission Guru–Shishya Tradition
A Message from Ritika · 3 min
The Space

Sattva Sanctuary

Held within the natural beauty of Sattva Sanctuary, this journey unfolds in a space intentionally created to support deep inner work and the path of the Goddess.

Nested in nature, the land itself invites stillness, presence, and receptivity. At its heart sits the Sri Yantra—a living symbol of creation and consciousness—anchoring the field in sacred geometry and subtle intelligence.

This is not merely a venue. It is a living container — designed to hold, support, and deepen your experience. The space has been prepared with reverence so that you may arrive fully, release completely, and receive deeply.

The Ten Wisdom Goddesses

The Dasha Mahavidyas

The ten Mahavidyas are distinct expressions of Shakti — the supreme feminine force — each a unique gateway into deeper awareness, self-knowledge, and liberation. In this immersion, you will receive teachings, mantra, and direct transmission from each of these wisdom streams.

I · Kali
Kālī

Embodiment of time and the destroyer of ego. She guides seekers beyond illusion into radical presence and the ultimate nature of reality.

II · Tara
Tārā

The compassionate guide through darkness. Her teachings illuminate the path through life's deepest challenges, offering protection and clarity.

III · Tripura Sundari
Tripura Sundarī

Sovereign of the three worlds. She embodies perfect beauty and divine harmony — her wisdom reveals the sacred within all of creation.

IV · Bhuvaneshwari
Bhuvaneshwarī

Mother of the universe. Her teaching is the underlying unity woven through all of existence — space itself as her body.

V · Bhairavi
Bhairavī

The fierce purifier. She invites courage — teaching through the fire of confronting what we fear, burning away what no longer serves.

VI · Chhinnamasta
Chhinnamastā

Patron of self-transcendence. She reveals the liberating power of surrender — the dissolution of separation through radical inner offering.

VII · Dhumavati
Dhūmāvatī

Wisdom of the void and of loss. She brings us into sacred relationship with endings, decay, and the profound teachings found in darkness.

VIII · Bagalamukhi
Bagalamukhi

The paralyzer of adversity. Her teachings reveal the sovereign power of speech, stillness, and the authority to silence what obscures truth.

IX · Matangi
Matangi

Goddess of inner knowing and sacred speech. She teaches the refinement of word, art, and expression as direct pathways to the divine.

X · Kamala
Kamalā

She who brings fullness. Her teachings integrate the spiritual and the material — abundance, grace, and the recognition of divinity within life itself.

The Experience

What You Will Receive

Each day is structured as a complete arc of deepening — moving from invocation through direct teaching, embodied practice, and integration. Nothing here is theoretical alone.

01
Mantra & Sacred Sound

Each Mahavidya carries her own mantra — a vibrational key that opens specific gateways within consciousness. You will receive, chant, and embody these sounds in the traditional way: with precision, presence, and lineage authority.

02
Shakti Meditation Practices

Drawn from the Sri Vidya lineage, these practices are not passive rest — they are active alignment with the living intelligence of Shakti, guiding you into deeper states of inner knowing and embodied presence.

03
Ritual, Yantra & Puja

Ritual is the language the goddess understands. Through puja, yantra work, and sacred ceremony, you will engage with each Mahavidya as a living presence — not concept, but direct encounter.

04
Gyana — Embodied Wisdom

The metaphysical teachings of Shakta Tantra illuminate the philosophical dimensions of each goddess — dissolving ego, integrating shadow, and recognising one's inherent divine nature.

05
Integration & Living Practice

You will leave with a personal practice framework — anchoring the wisdom of each Mahavidya into your sadhana, relationships, and daily embodiment long after the retreat ends.

Questions & Clarity

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from those considering this journey — answered honestly.

Prior experience with Tantra or Sri Vidya is not required, but a grounded inner work or meditation practice is. These teachings carry depth and work most powerfully with those who can receive them with genuine maturity and openness. If you're unsure whether you're ready, apply anyway — the process is designed to help you discern together with us.

This is a 6-day in-person sacred immersion into the ten wisdom goddesses of the Shakta Tantra tradition, held within the Sri Vidya lineage. Unlike wellness retreats or introductory yoga programs, this is a genuine lineage transmission — rooted in the guru–shishya tradition and offering mantra, ritual, meditation, and gyana (wisdom teachings) with the depth and rigor those require. It is designed for transformation, not simply inspiration.

Vamachara refers to a stream within Shakta Tantra that works with the full spectrum of experience — including shadow, the fierce, and the difficult — rather than avoiding it. In this program, these principles inform the philosophical and experiential depth of the teachings. The container is carefully held, the practices are traditional, and no extreme practices are employed. Safety, consent, and a well-prepared space are foundational to how this work is offered.

The Dasha Mahavidya Journey runs from September 9th to September 14th, 2026, as a fully in-person immersion at Sattva Sanctuary — a nature-embedded sacred space designed specifically for this kind of deep inner work. Exact location details are shared with confirmed participants after enrollment.

Because this is a lineage transmission with limited places, we use a gentle application process to ensure the group is well-held and that each participant is genuinely ready. Once your application is accepted, a non-refundable deposit is required to secure your place. Full payment terms are provided at that stage. The deposit is non-refundable as your place is held specifically for you once confirmed.

All tiers include full access to every teaching, mantra session, meditation practice, ritual, and integration circle across all six days, plus three nourishing vegetarian meals daily. The Shared Cabin and Single Cabin tiers also include overnight accommodation at Sattva Sanctuary. The Day Tripper option is for those attending daily without staying overnight.

Yes. Mantra transmission is a core element of this program. The form of transmission honors the traditional guru–shishya process and is offered through the direct presence of the teacher. These are not mantras to be casually collected — they are living transmissions, intended for sincere and committed practice. How they are worked with after the retreat is part of what you will receive guidance on.

It is both — and neither label fully captures it. The Dasha Mahavidya Journey is a Shakti immersion program within the Sri Vidya Tantric tradition. It honors the sacred feminine through authentic Tantric practices including mantra, ritual, meditation, and philosophical teaching. It is not a popular culture "tantra" program or a goddess-circle workshop — it is a sincere, lineage-rooted spiritual immersion that happens to work deeply with the divine feminine in all her forms.

The Invitation

If You Feel the Call

If something within you softens as you read these words…
If something within you recognises what is being offered…

Then perhaps this path is already unfolding within you.
You are welcome to step forward with reverence.
